resources.string: Citysnap
Discover what people in your city are really thinking.
Real thoughts. Real cities. Real people.
Discover what people in your city are really thinking.
Join Citysnap
Read real thoughts, opinions, and everyday moments from people around you. Share with your real name — no followers, no pressure.
Welcome back
See what people in your city are really thinking — work, life, relationships, rent, traffic, and more.
Enter Citysnap
Citysnap Premium
from Citysnap
Join me on Citysnap — discover what your city is really thinking.
Citysnap
📸 Snaps are photo posts from your city — not stories.
📍 Pick your city and area to see local posts.
👤 Posts show your real name. Guests can browse; sign in to post.
Search posts…

Citysnap Community Guidelines

Be respectful. Post about your city, locality, and daily life.

Not allowed:
• Harassment, hate speech, or threats
• Sexual or violent content
• Spam or misleading posts
• Sharing others' private information

Snaps (photos) must be appropriate for a public local feed. We may remove content and suspend accounts that break these rules.

Report posts or comments you believe violate these guidelines. Block users you don't want to see.

Contact: citysnap.play.review@gmail.com
https://harshalDharpure.github.io/Citysnap/privacy.html

Citysnap Privacy Policy

What we collect:
• Account: name, email (from sign-up or Google)
• Profile: city and locality you choose (not GPS)
• Posts: text, photos you upload, and your display name on posts
• Device: push notification token
• Diagnostics: Firebase Analytics and Crashlytics (no ads)

How we use it:
• Show your local city feed
• Display your name on posts and comments
• Send notifications you opt into
• Improve app stability and features

Your photos are stored securely on Amazon Web Services (S3). Account data lives in Google Firebase (Auth and Firestore). You can delete your account anytime from Profile — this removes your posts, comments, and profile data.

We do not sell your personal data.

Contact: citysnap.play.review@gmail.com
